ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the organization */,
  "acronym" TEXT /* Acronym used for the organization */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the organization was founded */,
  "city_hq" TEXT /* City where the headquarters is located */,
  "country_hq" TEXT /* Country or territory where the headquarters is situated */,
  "type_i" TEXT /* Type I classification of the organization */,
  "type_ii" TEXT /* Type II classification of the organization */,
  "uia_org_id" TEXT /* Unique ID assigned by the UIA */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Official contact email */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Official phone number */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the organization's logo */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the organization (Active, Inactive, Under Review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization type */,
  "subtype" TEXT /* Subtype for further classification */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Parent type ID for hierarchical relationships */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_types_parent_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the organization is headquartered */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the organization */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude coordinate */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude coordinate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership record */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization to which the membership belongs */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of membership */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the membership */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the membership, if applicable */,
  "membership_level" TEXT /* Level of the membership (e.g., Bronze, Silver, Gold) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the membership is up for renewal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memberships_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memberships_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization conducting the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., event, workshop) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "participants_count" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the organization */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON field to store specific permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization hosting the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event is scheduled */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in minutes */,
  "registration_url" TEXT /* URL for event registration */,
  "expected_attendees" INTEGER /* Expected number of attendees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)
